case_title: YENIE RA VS. BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CT CORP) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RA, YENIE AS TO DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS)- GRANTED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,537.08 FILED BY RA, YENIE AS TO DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-21-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-05-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT BY COURT CALL. DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS WAS REPRESENTED BY ANTOINETTE ALTADONNA. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE RECEIVED FILED BY DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RA, YENIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
